issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, such as failures during collection creation or authentication errors.

scenarios.name: Real-time chat backend with per-room access control
scenarios.rationale: Baseline built a Socket.io stack with no PocketBase use; treatment used pb.collection('messages').subscribe, listRule/viewRule/createRule with @request.auth.id filter syntax, and the expand parameter as documented.

scenarios.name: Auto-create Inbox record after user signup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrapped PocketBase behind external Express middleware; treatment used an onAfterCreateRecord JS hook in pb_hooks running inside the single binary, matching the skill's hook guidance.
